footer.description: Professional high-end interior painting and exterior spray painting for homes across Montreal and the West Island. Family owned and operated for over 25 years.

hero.subtitle: High-end interior painting and exterior spray painting. Family owned and operated for over 25 years. We deliver flawless results that last.
hero.trust: Professional Consultation • No commitment • Fast response

video.title: See Our Work in Action
video.subtitle: Get a behind-the-scenes look at how we transform spaces across Montreal.

features.prepDesc: We include drywall repairs and plastering to ensure a perfect finish.

services.title: Our Painting Services
services.subtitle: We specialize in transforming homes with premium paints and meticulous attention to detail.
services.interiorDesc: High-end interior painting that breathes new life into your living spaces. We handle everything from walls and ceilings to trim and doors.
services.exteriorDesc: Transform your home's exterior with our specialized spray painting service for brick, aluminum, and vinyl siding.

process.title: Our Simple 3-Step Process
process.subtitle: We've streamlined our process to make your painting project as stress-free as possible.
process.step1Desc: Fill out the form below. We'll review your details and contact you within 24 hours.
process.step2Desc: We provide a transparent proposal with exact timelines, materials, and pricing. No guesswork.
process.step3Desc: Our team executes flawlessly, cleans up completely, and does a final walkthrough to ensure 100% satisfaction.

whyUs.title: Why choose Trisalex
whyUs.subtitle: A service designed for demanding customers
whyUs.desc: At Trisalex, we don't just paint walls. We deliver well-managed projects, executed on time and with constant attention to detail:
whyUs.goalDesc: to offer you complete peace of mind, from the first contact to the final delivery.
